nodes.label: CEO Lens — Strategy & Optionality
nodes.rationale: Examines long-term direction, mission alignment, future optionality, and opportunity cost of decisions

nodes.label: CFO Lens — Capital & Financial Risk
nodes.rationale: Examines costs, returns, unit economics, cash flow impact, and financial sustainability

nodes.label: COO Lens — Execution & Operations
nodes.rationale: Examines feasibility, operational dependencies, scalability, and process repeatability

nodes.label: CMO Lens — Market & Brand
nodes.rationale: Examines customer positioning, competitive context, distribution channels, and reputational risk

nodes.label: CTO Lens — Technology & Architecture
nodes.rationale: Examines technical feasibility, architectural trade-offs, build vs buy, technical debt, and security/privacy implications

nodes.label: CHRO Lens — People & Culture
nodes.rationale: Examines skill gaps, talent risks, culture/morale impact, and organizational design requirements

nodes.label: Red-Team Steelman Opposition Argument
nodes.rationale: Builds the strongest possible case against a user position without balance or recovery path, finding most damaging and plausible objections

nodes.label: Forced Methodology for Topic Research
nodes.rationale: Enforces explicit framing, multi-angle source planning, fact-vs-inference labeling, and consistent layered output for substantive research

nodes.label: Quick-Scan Mode
nodes.rationale: Single search round with light source planning, 5-10 minute depth, 300-500 words output

nodes.label: Deep-Dive Mode
nodes.rationale: Multi-step methodology with multiple search rounds and web_fetch on load-bearing sources, 1000+ word output

nodes.label: Compare-Options Mode
nodes.rationale: Consistent criteria applied across named alternatives for comparative analysis

nodes.label: Learning by Doing Framework
nodes.rationale: Guides user through reasoning by providing framework, asking application, and reacting to attempt rather than giving answer directly

nodes.label: Companion for Hard Times
nodes.rationale: Provides warm non-clinical companionship using presence, not response; compassion not emotional mirroring; user-led pacing

nodes.label: Vent Mode
nodes.rationale: User needs space to say it out loud, wants acknowledgment not analysis

nodes.label: Process Mode
nodes.rationale: User wants help making sense of feelings, open to gentle questions

nodes.label: Decide Mode
nodes.rationale: User wants to figure out a next step, open to light reframes or framework prompts

nodes.label: Multi-Tradition Divination
nodes.rationale: Quick fun predictions using multiple astrological traditions, selecting primary tradition plus optional cross-check per question type

nodes.label: Specific Question Mode
nodes.rationale: Provides verdict plus brief reasoning from primary tradition for oracle-style decisions

nodes.label: Daily Luck Overview Mode
nodes.rationale: Structured day reading with signature, activities, lucky symbols, and best window

nodes.label: Auspicious Timing Mode
nodes.rationale: Picks auspicious day/window from next 1-4 weeks using tradition logic

nodes.label: Japanese Rokuyo
nodes.rationale: 6-day lunar cycle providing timing-within-day refinement through values like Taian (most auspicious), Butsumetsu (most inauspicious), and morning/afternoon splits

nodes.label: Chinese BaZi and Zodiac
nodes.rationale: Year-animal interactions (harmony triangles and clashes) and day pillar stem-branch analysis for predicting collaborative or conflicting energies

nodes.label: Western Astrology
nodes.rationale: Moon sign emotional weather, Mercury/Venus/Mars retrogrades, and void-of-course Moon for daily readings and specific questions

nodes.label: Thai Day-of-Week Astrology
nodes.rationale: Calendar-driven day-planet associations (Sun/Moon/Mars/Mercury/Rahu/Jupiter/Venus/Saturn) with lucky colors and energy themes, backbone for daily questions

nodes.label: Vedic Jyotish
nodes.rationale: Rahu Kalam inauspicious daily windows and Nakshatra lunar mansion flavors (soft/nourishing, sharp/fierce, mixed/movable) for timing and emotional weather

nodes.label: Competency-Based Interview Backbone
nodes.rationale: Structural backbone of competency → behavioral evidence → calibrated judgment applies to both candidate prep and interviewer design

nodes.label: Interviewee Prep Mode
nodes.rationale: Candidate-side prep: decode role → STAR story bank → universals → role-specific layer → cross-cultural/format calibration → pre-mortem

nodes.label: Interviewer Design Mode
nodes.rationale: Interviewer-side design: job analysis → behavioral/situational questions → behaviorally-anchored rubric → loop structure → bias check → debrief protocol

nodes.label: Interview Debrief Mode
nodes.rationale: Post-interview learning: hygiene → diagnose specific moments → distinguish performance from process/luck → one thing to do differently
